on_start.default: Lie on your back and stretch your arms above your head.

on_end.default: End of exercise, let's get ready for the next exercise.

on_warning.wrong_pose: You are doing the exercise wrong.
on_warning.wrong_lift: You are lifting the wrong leg.
on_warning.raised_left_hand: Put your raised left hand down.
on_warning.raised_right_hand: Put your raised right hand down.
on_warning.Iba_prava_noha_nizko: Extend your right leg upwards more.
on_warning.Iba_prava_noha_daleko: Your right leg is tilted too far towards your head, turn it upwards
on_warning.Iba_lava_ruka_nizko: Extend your left arm upwards more.
on_warning.Iba_lava_ruka_daleko: Your left hand is tilted too far towards your head, turn it upwards.
on_warning.Iba_lava_noha_nizko: Extend your left leg upwards more.
on_warning.Iba_lava_noha_daleko: Your left leg is tilted too far towards your head, turn it upwards.
on_warning.Iba_prava_ruka_nizko: Extend your right arm upwards more.
on_warning.Iba_prava_ruka_daleko: Your right hand is tilted too far towards your head, turn it upwards.
on_warning.Ruka_a_noha_nizko: Turn your outstretched arm and leg more upwards.
on_warning.Ruka_a_noha_daleko: The extended arm and leg are too far towards your head, move them further up.
on_warning.Prava_noha_daleko_a_lava_ruka_nizko: You do not keep your outstretched leg and arm in a perpendicular position.
on_warning.Prava_noha_nizko_a_lava_ruka_daleko: You do not keep your outstretched leg and arm in a perpendicular position.
on_warning.Prava_ruka_nizko_a_lava_noha_daleko: You do not keep your outstretched leg and arm in a perpendicular position.
on_warning.Prava_ruka_daleko_a_lava_noha_nizko: You do not keep your outstretched leg and arm in a perpendicular position.
